Notice Of Motion And Mp&As In Support Of Plaintiff'S Motion To Remove Case From Arbitration Hearing List (Local Rule 4.1(D)(C))
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Remove Case from Arbitration Hearing List is heard this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case set for Jury Trial on 5/24/2004 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Case to be referred to the ESP Program. Proceedings reported by: Mary Hinds. (212)
